mundo.titulo: Russia was behind arson attacks targeting PM, BBC reveals
mundo.resumen: Evidence shows Russians directing the plot and stoking tensions with fake far-right and Muslim groups.

mundo.resumen: Preston Davey died after months of sexual and physical abuse at the hands of Jamie Varley.

mundo.titulo: Henry Nowak killer's sentence referred to Court of Appeal under unduly lenient scheme
mundo.resumen: The sentence of Vickrum Digwa, who was convicted of the murder of Henry Nowak, has been referred to the Court of Appeal.

mundo.titulo: Palestine Action ban is lawful, Court of Appeal rules
mundo.resumen: The Home Office had challenged a High Court ruling that the group's proscription should be quashed.

negocios.titulo: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced

negocios.resumen: When the conflict began on 28 February, fuel costs jumped as the war disrupted the production and transportation of energy across the Middle East.

tecnologia.titulo: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
tecnologia.resumen: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export control restrictions on Anthropic’s models Fable and Mythos, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.

tecnologia.resumen: SpaceX's IPO underwriters maxed out their share purchases, adding to an already historic amount of money raised.

tecnologia.resumen: The ban would apply to a range of social media platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

tecnologia.titulo: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
tecnologia.resumen: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.
